title: rubus fissus var. acicularis
intro: Rubus fissus var. acicularis, also known as the Thimble Bramble or Thimble Raspberry, is a variety of the Rubus genus, a type of bramble plant native to New Zealand. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties, derived from its berries, leaves, and roots. The health benefits of Rubus fissus var. acicularis include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting immune function, as well as potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. The plant is often prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
